final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing educational infographic explaining the definitions of and relationships among 7 AI-related concepts.

Style/medium: needs a hand-drawn illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include all 7 concepts as distinct visual nodes with connecting lines/arrows showing relationships, definitions embedded alongside each node
Subject: must include all 7 concepts with brief definitions and relationship links:
  - AI
  - MCP
  - AI Agent
  - OpenClaw
  - AI Skill
  - 蒸馏
  - CLI
Scene/backdrop: needs a light, approachable infographic layout — exact background treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs a friendly, easy-to-read direction — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: needs a hand-drawn / sketch texture feel — exact line weight and paper texture are yours
Text (verbatim): must include all 7 concept labels verbatim: "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI"
Constraints: must preserve all 7 concept nodes; definitions and relationship arrows must be legible; layout must be approachable and easy to understand at a glance
Avoid:
